name: 恶魔冲击
description: 对任意敌方棋子造成自身攻击力100%的物理伤害（恶魔变形期间共2次）
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 99, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) return target; var result = dealDamage(caster, target, caster.attack, 'physical', battle, context.skill.id); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '使用恶魔冲击，对' + target.name + '造成' + result.damage + '点伤害' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对任意敌人造成' + piece.attack + '点物理伤害（攻击力100%，恶魔变形期间可用）', expectedValues: { damage: piece.attack } }; }
